name: codex-crosscompat

regression_log.reason: REWORK verdict: 3 criticals (adapter contract unverified, TOML unsourced, security compensation non-viable), 5 false knowns, 8 compound failures

describe.confidence_note: Research brief provides strong foundation; steps derived directly from validated research.

specify.confidence_note: Rev 2: all revalidation findings addressed. 4 PostToolUse hooks reclassified as portable (Figma ground truth). Work graph dependencies corrected. Plugin manifest hooks field added.

challenge.confidence_note: Revalidation pass: 0 critical, 4 high (all addressed inline), 2 medium, 3 low. Spec grounded in validated ground truth. Remaining uncertainty: stderr vs stdout feedback channel (flagged for WU3 validation).

edge_cases.confidence_note: Edge cases found 3 critical boundary issues (path scope, success criterion contradiction, plugin.json nesting). All addressed inline. Remaining uncertainty: stderr vs stdout (flagged for WU3 empirical validation).

premortem.confidence_note: 5 NEW operational findings, 3 COVERED. Key pattern: opt-in checks fail under failover pressure. No critical findings — all are high/medium operational improvements.

review.skip_reason: Extensive scrutiny: 2 critique rounds (27 findings), 12 edge cases, 8 pre-mortem scenarios, ground truth validation. Remaining uncertainty is empirical (stderr/stdout), not reviewable.

test.confidence_note: 21 spec-blind tests generated: 15 behavior, 5 contract, 5 failure mode. Anti-tautology review clean. All tests verify observable behavior, not implementation structure.

decisions.rationale: The diffs between Claude and Codex representations are the value — they document divergence as a chapter of the repos journey

decisions.decision: Source in scripts/, copy to codex/hooks/ during conversion
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth in scripts/, deployed copy in codex/

decisions.decision: Pass enforcement language through unchanged in v1. Iterate empirically via divergence tracking.
decisions.rationale: Mechanical conversion is valuable standalone. Behavioral tuning requires real GPT-4.1 compliance data — guessing is premature optimization. WU10 divergence tracking supports iteration.

decisions.decision: All SessionStart hooks fire on both startup AND resume
decisions.rationale: Epistemic preflight handles upsert (no double-counting). Framework is lightweight. Resume is a valid state recovery point for all three hooks.

archive_reason: Closed. First-party Anthropic/OpenAI cross-compat plugins resolved core issues; remaining work continued in-house via Codex.
